title: Sudden Dyspnea - Pulmonary Embolism
chief_complaint: Sudden onset shortness of breath and right-sided chest pain for 3 hours. Recently returned from a long flight.

hidden_data.ct_pe: CTPA: Large filling defect in right main pulmonary artery

patient_responses.onset: It started suddenly 3 hours ago, I felt like I couldn't breathe
patient_responses.travel: I just came back from a 12-hour flight from Dubai
patient_responses.leg_pain: My right calf has been sore for a few days

hints.diagnostic: Check D-Dimer first, then CTPA if positive

feedback.correct_message: Excellent diagnosis, Doctor! Massive PE requires immediate action.
feedback.incorrect_message: This presentation is classic for PE: sudden dyspnea + risk factors + right heart strain.
feedback.attending_note: Massive PE is life-threatening. Start therapeutic anticoagulation immediately. Consider thrombolysis if hemodynamically unstable. Well done identifying the risk factors and ordering appropriate tests.
